corrections.summary: Added non-triviality clause to Axiom 3; fixed Prop 1.2 contradiction argument (was citing N3 incorrectly)
Fixed incorrect C2 citation for strict positivity; replaced with proper argument from normalization + observer non-degeneracy
Fixed equality to inequality E >= hbar*omega; equality only for minimal observer
Added Illman 1983 reference for n>=4 uniqueness
Added remark about I≡1 vs N3 compliance

keyResults: Axiom 3: non-trivial cyclic dynamics with period T > 0
Structural Postulate S1: compact topological manifold, free U(1) orbits
Theorem 0.0: smooth structure derived from S1 + Axiom 3 (not assumed)
Theorem 0.1: G_O-invariant Riemannian metric via Weyl averaging
Corollary 2.3: faithful U(1) action on Sigma
Theorem 3.1: Noether pair (U(1) symmetry <-> conserved charge) under symplectic structure
Lyapunov stability required; instability implies dissolution
Approximate closure: drift bound N*epsilon, lifetime tau = N_max * T
Coherence cost S_O > 0 with positive lower bound S_min
